def fetch_user_data(user_id: int) -> dict:
    return {"id": user_id, "name": "John"}


def processOrder(order_data: dict) -> dict:
    return {"status": "processed"}


def get_user_profile(userId: int) -> dict:
    return {"id": userId, "profile": {}}


def update_order_status(orderId: int, newStatus: str) -> None:
    pass


def send_notification(userId: int, message: str) -> None:
    pass


def getAccountBalance(accountId: int) -> float:
    return 0.0
